name: 16.4oz Tall Hammered Glass - Threshold™
description:
Add an artistic touch to your drinkware collection with the 18-Ounce Tall Hammered Glass from Threshold™. This clear tumbler features a tall design in a hammered finish for an artful effect you'll love whether you're hosting guests or enjoying a drink alone. Best of all, this tall glass is suitable for both hot and cold beverages, and can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup after use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
